user.title: Connect to Virtual Lymow mower
user.description: Configure snapshot polling and motion detection.

data_description.mower_ip: IP or hostname of the mower's local web server (for example 192.168.1.25).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch a new camera snapshot from the mower.
data_description.motion_threshold: Minimum image-difference score required to consider the mower as moving.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch a new camera snapshot from the mower.
data_description.motion_threshold: Minimum image-difference score required to consider the mower as moving.
